utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 6 items requested in the final format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. All 6 items appear in the final property solution. Now check each for full specification: 1) property: includes selected property with details and price (address, price, details, neighborhood) — fully specified. 2) financing: includes solution with terms (type, amounts, down payment, interest rate, LTV, monthly payment, fee, rate lock, status) — fully specified. 3) legal_services: legal services with costs (provider, service, cost, timeline, includes) — fully specified. 4) moving_services: moving arrangements with costs (provider, service, cost, booking timeline, status) — fully specified. 5) setup_services: utility and setup services (providers, service, cost, includes, activation; also survey provider, cost, type, timeline) — fully specified. 6) total_budget: complete cost breakdown (property price, down payment, legal, survey, moving, utilities, arrangement fee, total upfront, monthly mortgage, remaining savings, total monthly housing costs) — fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes specific selections that correspond to items in the ground-truth ratings: a purchase property matching the 'Family House' profile at CAD $650K; financing via 'First-Time Buyer Mortgage'; legal services as 'Premium Legal Package'; moving services as 'Standard Moving'; and a survey type 'Full Structural Survey'. Utilities listed as 'Premium Utilities package' matches 'Premium Utilities' in utility_setup.
